purpose: Add imagegen-assisted but evidence-bounded visual companions for the grounding and navigation derivation pages.
claim_boundary: AI-generated slot imagery is exposition only. Registered render pairs, metric panels, route panels, and stills are the evidence-bearing material.

ai_generated_slot.rationale: No readable pseudo-text, filesystem path, author name, logo, or red fallback material was visible. It is used only as a schematic slot.

standalone_figures.rationale: The panel ties point-in-box and normalized-coordinate formulas to registered original/noMDL target-view render pairs; the AI slot is visually separated as a metric gate.
The panel ties SR, NE, SPL, and TL to metric charts, route strips, rollout stills, and selected cases. The small red fraction comes from route/point annotations, not material fallback.

rendered_pdf_pages.rationale: The grounding companion fills the former sparse derivation page without caption collision.
The navigation companion remains readable at full width and no longer creates a caption-only terminal page.
The navigation caption is followed by the metric-boundary summary and visual bridge after replacing the hard page break with a soft separation.
The following VLM protocol atlas page remains intact after the derivation-section reflow.

positive_patterns_present: AI-generated metric-contract schematic used only for exposition
not new metrics, model predictions, or benchmark rows
negative_patterns_absent: Red material in these diagnostic cases

commands: pdftotext paper/venues/acl27/build/supplement.pdf - | rg -n "Grounding derivation render companion|Navigation derivation media companion|AI-generated metric-contract schematic used only for exposition|not new metrics, model predictions, or benchmark rows"
if pdftotext paper/venues/acl27/build/supplement.pdf - | rg -n "Red material in these diagnostic cases|fig_vlm_grounding_cases|/cpfs/user|Zihou"; then exit 1; else echo "negative tokens absent"; fi
